_comment: Tunables for the report. budgetTarget is the monthly GCP spend target (USD) used in the budget lines and the final 🎯 target section. reportLagDays is how many days behind 'today' the default report covers (2 because the GCP billing export lags ~1-2 days; the most recent day's data is usually incomplete). Apps with Rolling-30 cost below otherThreshold are rolled into a compact 'Other apps' table instead of a full section. Projects whose name matches a marketplacePattern (regex) are grouped under marketplaceLabel, not treated as apps. defaultEmoji is used for production apps absent from apps.json.
